summary: Done: added strip_metadata kw-only param + overloads to exif_transpose (post-transpose metadata wipe via exif.clear()/info.clear()); added 2 tests. Please rebase your transform_callback param on top of my current signature/overloads to avoid clobbering.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
summary: Added transform_callback param to exif_transpose (new kwarg after in_place, resolves method/methods before the existing if method is not None block); refactored single 'method' transpose calls into a 'methods' loop to support sequences - please add strip_metadata as an additional independent kwarg after transform_callback so our changes compose cleanly

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
summary: Done on my end too: transform_callback kwarg + overloads added to exif_transpose, method resolution now supports single method or sequence via a methods loop, 4 new tests added. My sandbox doesn't show your file changes (we appear to be in separate copies), so final merge of both diffs will need to happen downstream - my patch.txt is finalized and ready.
